examples: She's a curious mixture of stubbornness and servility.
The homing pigeon is very intelligent and will persevere to the point of stubbornness.
Nonconformity and stubbornness (and Yeats's level of arrogance and self absorption) are likely to lead to Conflicts with teachers.
Loosing heads and losing heads are apparently skills linked quite closely by stubbornness and pride.
Hard-headed stubbornness is not s trait that people generally admire in others, politicians or otherwise.
